parents.subject: LU-1842 quota: remove quota code from lvfs

commit.subject: LU-1558 tests: run MMP with one ldiskfs target
commit.message:
LU-1558 tests: run MMP with one ldiskfs target

If either the MDT or OST is configured as ldiskfs, allow the mmp.sh
test to be run.  This will be needed when we allow ZFS OSTs, but
not yet ZFS MDTs, so that we don't lose all mmp.sh test coverage.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2449e992f30a6ecaa4ce65dbc0696710bf742e9b
